nature: tensor-parallel projection conformance, corrected CPU-only before any live prompt; realizes the already-frozen standard logit-lens baseline — no semantic words, layers, cadence, top-k, prompts, labels, or comparators changed

corrections.projection_path: residual projection now routes through the live model's supported compute_logits/LogitsProcessor path (final norm applied first); direct ParallelLMHead.forward is never called (vLLM makes it raise, and shard-local outputs are not valid global readouts)
corrections.collective_safety: every TP rank executes an identical fixed chunk walk over identical capture state, so gather collectives cannot deadlock; call counts are test-asserted equal across simulated ranks
corrections.authority: token ids and semantic scores come only from the rank receiving full global-vocabulary logits; non-root ranks return bounded status/counters and never emit shard-local ids
corrections.padding_and_range: logits are trimmed to config vocab_size before top-k; an id-range guard raises on any out-of-vocabulary index
corrections.chunking: PROJECTION_CHUNK_SLOTS = 8, frozen as a resource control before the first live prompt

tests: tests/test_m37jc_bridge.py — 13 CPU tests including forbidden direct head forward, root/non-root split, second-shard winner global id, poisoned-padding trim, identical cross-rank call counts, bounded chunking, disabled-path parity
